title: croton batangasensis
intro: Croton batangasensis, also known as Batangas croton, is a plant species belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family. It is traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in the Philippines, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Croton batangasensis include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and skin infections, while also possessing anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Croton batangasensis include teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to alleviate symptoms and promote overall well-being.
